/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/FTRRECORDED/LDTR:02-25-22/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO02-09-22 IN DEPT 11/X: BAIL SET AT $5,000/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT STAY/DOPC/

/CAL:RELEASE CONDITIONS/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:02-01-22 IN DEPT, 17 TO SET/DOP/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:I&A P&C AND STATUS OF M99 IN CASE 22000754/X:M99 HOLD LIFTED AND DEFENDANT HAS A FELONY ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT 11 TODAY,01-26-22, AT 130PM/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:02-25-22/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & JURY TRIAL/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 11/TRANS 11:FORTHWITH FOR RELEASE CONDITIONS/
